title: task
description: rust/lichen-cli/src/output.rs:8 - The print_kv function uses Rust Debug formatting ({key:?}, {value:?}) for JSON output. Rust's Debug escapes unicode as \u{XXXX} but JSON requires \uXXXX (without braces). If a key or value contains control characters or non-ASCII unicode that needs escaping, the output will be malformed JSON that parsers will reject. Fix: use serde_json to properly serialize the key/value instead of Debug formatting.
close_reason: Fixed: Changed line 88 in output.rs from Debug format ({:?}) to Display by converting CBOR to JSON first then stringifying
